panel.title: Battery Monitor Plus
settings.refreshInterval.desc: How often the bar and panel refresh battery power and time text.
settings.refreshInterval.label: Refresh interval
settings.showPowerInBar.desc: Show the current battery charge or discharge rate next to the battery graphic in the bar.
settings.showPowerInBar.label: Show power draw in bar
settings.showTimeInBar.desc: Show the estimated time to empty or full next to the battery graphic in the bar.
settings.showTimeInBar.label: Show remaining time in bar
